from myapp.billing._internal import compute_tax, apply_discount
from myapp.users._helpers import hash_password, validate_email
from myapp.notifications._templates import render_email, build_sms


def process_payment(order):
    tax = compute_tax(order.amount, order.country)
    discounted = apply_discount(order.amount, order.coupon)
    return discounted + tax


def register_user(data):
    hashed = hash_password(data["password"])
    validate_email(data["email"])
    return create_user(data["email"], hashed)


def notify_user(user, message):
    email_body = render_email(user.name, message)
    sms_text = build_sms(user.phone, message)
    send_email(user.email, email_body)
    send_sms(user.phone, sms_text)
